case_title: JEROD HOFFMAN VS. BAY 1 FITNESS, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOFFMAN, JEROD AS TO DEFENDANT BAY 1 FITNESS, INC.
